title: Self-contained staggered-DiD case anchored on the repo's own demo
gold_source: Own simulation: did_demo.ipynb sets TRUE_ATT = 2.0 (per-period true treatment effect) as the data-generating ground truth; any faithful staggered estimator must recover it.
description: This is the one case in the suite whose gold value we OWN rather than transcribe: the repo's DiD demo simulates a staggered-adoption panel with a known per-period treatment effect of 2.0. A faithful heterogeneity-robust estimator (Callaway-Sant'Anna, Sun-Abraham, or BJS imputation) must recover ~2.0; a naive TWFE estimate can be biased by negative weighting and is the standard cautionary contrast. Use this case to smoke-test that the benchmark scorer and a Stage 3 backend agree before pointing the harness at transcribed published cases.

primary_coefficients.name: att
primary_coefficients.note: Average per-period ATT. TRUE_ATT in did_demo.ipynb. The robust staggered estimator's overall ATT should land here; naive TWFE may not.

candidate_contract.where: Stage 3 writes estimates to 03_analysis/results/ (e.g. group_time_att.* / estimates.json).
candidate_contract.format: A JSON object {"coefficients": {"att": {"value": <float>}}} or the bare shorthand {"att": <float>}.
candidate_contract.note: The benchmark scores the produced number; it does not run the estimator.
